jsonLd.title: Specsmakers is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Specsmakers family as a E-commerce Executive in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Specsmakers:
Specsmakers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers!
